errors.validateDeletion: Failed to validate deletion. Please try again.
errors.confirmDeletion: Failed to confirm tax rate deletion.

validation.requiredFieldsTitle: Please fill in the required fields:

dialog.description: Enter the details for the tax rate.

precedence.title: Tax Calculation Precedence
precedence.clientExempt: Client tax exempt flag is checked first (if exempt, no tax applied)
precedence.serviceSpecific: Service-specific tax rate is used if assigned
precedence.clientDefault: Client default tax rate is used as fallback
precedence.regionLookup: Tax region lookup determines applicable rate based on location

components.simpleRateMessage: This is a simple tax rate, not a composite rate. Tax components are only used for composite taxes.
components.enableCompositeMessage: To use tax components, mark this rate as composite when editing it.

brackets.intro: Progressive tax brackets apply different rates to different portions of an amount.
brackets.precedence: When brackets are defined, they take precedence over the flat percentage rate.

errors.add: Failed to add services to plan

Fixed.label: Fixed Price
Fixed.description: A fixed-price service with consistent billing regardless of usage. Ideal for predictable services.

Hourly.label: Hourly Rate
Hourly.description: Time-based billing with configurable rates. Best for variable workloads billed by time spent.

Usage.label: Usage-Based
Usage.description: Usage-based billing with tiered pricing options. Perfect for services measured by consumption.

Bucket.label: Bucket Hours
Bucket.description: Pre-purchased hours that can be used over time. Good for clients who need flexibility with a budget cap.

warningDialog.title: Change Configuration Type?
warningDialog.description: Changing the configuration type will reset any type-specific settings. This action cannot be undone.

quantity.label: Quantity
quantity.help: Number of units of this service

customRate.label: Custom Rate
customRate.helpUseDefault: Leave blank to use default rate ({{rate}})

billingCycleAlignment.label: Billing Cycle Alignment
billingCycleAlignment.help: Controls how partial-period coverage is calculated when the recurring fee needs to scale to less than a full service period.

minimumBillableTime.label: Minimum Billable Time (minutes)
minimumBillableTime.errorNegative: Minimum billable time cannot be negative

roundUpToNearest.label: Round Up To Nearest (minutes)
roundUpToNearest.help: Round time entries up to nearest increment
roundUpToNearest.errorNegative: Round up value cannot be negative

newUserTypeRate.label: Rate
newUserTypeRate.errorNegative: User type rate cannot be negative

unitOfMeasure.label: Unit of Measure
unitOfMeasure.help: The unit used to measure usage (e.g., GB, User, Device)

minimumUsage.label: Minimum Usage Threshold
minimumUsage.help: Minimum billable usage per period (0 for no minimum)

tiers.title: Pricing Tiers
tiers.empty: No tiers configured. Add a tier to define volume-based pricing.
tiers.help: Configure volume-based pricing tiers. Each tier applies its rate to usage that falls within its range.

errors.onlyLastUnlimited: Only the last tier can have an unlimited upper bound
errors.upperGreaterThanLower: Tier upper bound must be greater than lower bound

totalMinutes.label: Total Minutes
totalMinutes.help: The total number of minutes included in this bucket contract line
totalMinutes.errorPositive: Total minutes must be greater than zero

billingPeriod.label: Billing Period
billingPeriod.help: The period over which the bucket hours are allocated
billingPeriod.mismatch: Bucket billing period ({{billingPeriod}}) should match contract line billing frequency ({{contractLineBillingFrequency}})

overageRate.label: Overage Rate
overageRate.help: The hourly rate charged for hours used beyond the bucket limit

fields.allowRollover: Allow unused hours to roll over to next period

rateTiers.title: Rate Tiers & Quantity Discounts
rateTiers.description: Configure different rates based on quantity ranges. Higher quantities can have discounted rates.

errors.minPositive: Minimum quantity must be greater than 0
errors.maxGreaterThanMin: Maximum quantity must be greater than minimum quantity

taxRate.label: Tax Rate
taxRate.help: Select 'Non-Taxable' if this service should not be taxed.

serviceDetail.title: Service Configuration: {{serviceName}}
serviceDetail.description: Configure service details, pricing, and tax settings

baseRate.help: The base rate can be overridden with quantity-based tiers below.
